candidate_definitions.text: Code for the paper 'Learning TSP Requires Rethinking Generalization' (CP 2021)

This repository contains code for the paper [**"Learning TSP Requires Rethinking Generalization"**](https://arxiv.org/abs/2006.07054) by Chaitanya K. Joshi, Quentin Cappart, Louis-Martin Rousseau, Thomas Laurent, accepted to the **27th International Conference on Principles and …
